title: Central Limit Theorem
short_description: A quick, stressful high-score survival shooter where you protect your core from attacking shapes.
description: Central Limit Theorem is a survival shooter where you have to protect your core for as long as you can from the shapes attacking it. It's a quick, simple, stressful, high-score shooter designed to be played between other, more substantial games.

awards.name: IDGA Scotland Community Choice Award (Edinburgh Winner)
